title: Would love ability to make Group level templates
excerpt:
I would love the ability to make group level templates within board templates.

posts.author: Nordbadger (Matthew Nordby)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love the ability to make group level templates within board templates.
For example, if I have 10 different board templates I use, but I now need to add a group to all of them, it would be a real relief to make the group with all of the pulses I need one time and then just add that group as a template to the others, rather than having to rebuild the group in all 10 different board templates.

I realize you can duplicate groups and move them between boards, but that requires then renaming the groups so they don’t say “duplicate” which, for one or two groups isn’t so bad, but for multiple groups, it turns into a lot of unnecessary time spent.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nordbadger ,

The Duplicates and Uniques app can help you with this, even automatically using the copy and templates functionality. Here is a demo of how the Copy works and here is how to create groups or boards dynamically. You can always write to support@kolaai.com should you need any help

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nordbadger!

Thank you for that request. I will make sure to pass it so it can be reviewed by our team

Of course, you should check out @kolaai’s recommendation to see if it fits your needs

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: Nordbadger (Matthew Nordby)
posts.cookedHtml: @kolaai @Matias.Monday I appreciate the suggestion, but it’s not really a solution to have to pay for another app to get basic functionality like this. The company I’m working with is already paying a lot for Monday so they expect a lot from Monday.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @Nordbadger!

As of today, that functionality is not something offered by monday.

Because of this, the best I can do is to let our R&D team know about your feature request so that they can be aware of the fact that there are users who would benefit from it and take it into account for the future (and hopefully implement it), and point into the direction of a possible workaround (in this case, checking if an app from our marketplace fits your needs).

Thank you for the feedback and the request! It will be reviewed by our team

Warmly,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
